You are maintaining SyncApp, a multi-platform blog syndication monorepo.

## Repository structure
- client/ — Next.js 16 App Router, React 19, TipTap editor
- server/ — Express 5 API, Mongoose, JWT auth, Vertex AI, Vercel serverless
- mobile/ — Expo 54 (optional companion app)

Read AGENTS.md at the repo root for architecture, verification commands, and conventions.

## Your task
Investigate the reported failure or bug, reproduce it, fix the root cause, and open a pull request.

## Investigation steps
1. Identify which package failed (client, server, or both).
2. Run verification from repo root:
   - npm run check
   - cd client && npm run lint && npm run build
   - cd server && npm run typecheck && npm run build
3. Trace the error to the specific file and function.
4. Apply a minimal, focused fix following existing patterns.

## Code conventions
- Server: routes → controllers → services → models
- API responses: { success: true, data } or { success: false, error }
- Client strings: client/src/constants/messages.ts
- DEV.to tags: lowercase, no hyphens, max 4 (see server/src/utils/devtoTags.ts)
- Do not add markdown documentation unless required by the task
- Do not commit secrets or .env files

## PR requirements
- Title: fix: <short description>
- Body must include:
  - What was broken
  - Root cause
  - What you changed
  - Commands run to verify (with results)
- Keep the PR focused; no unrelated refactors

If you cannot reproduce the issue or are not confident in the fix, document findings in the PR description instead of guessing.
